agent_optimizer: Agent auto-tuning: analyze tool usage patterns from tool_stats, generate optimization suggestions and call strategies.
browser_use: Browser automation: web browsing, information retrieval, web search, form filling, screenshots, data scraping.
code_exec: Code execution: run test suites or execute code snippets (Python/Node) with sandbox isolation.
cron_scheduler: Scheduled task management: create/list/pause/resume/delete scheduled tasks.
delegate_external_agent: Delegate tasks to external ACP Agent runners
doc_reader: Multi-format document parsing: PDF/DOCX/PPTX/XLSX/CSV/Image OCR → structured text.
glob_search: Find files matching a glob pattern
security_scan: Security scanning: detect leaked secrets/tokens/passwords + audit dependency vulnerabilities.
send_file_to_user: Send a file to the user
view_image: Load an image file for viewing
view_video: Load a video file for viewing
session_search: Search historical sessions and memory files.
skill_manager: Dynamic skill management: load/unload/hot-reload/list dynamic skills.
todo_tool: Manage the current session's task list.
tool_stats: Tool usage tracking: view/query/reset tool call statistics.
web_search: Web search tool, no API Key required.
submit_to_agent: Submit a background task to another agent
check_agent_task: Check status of a background task
